cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out the correct order of the places from east to west. Let me start by reading the passage again and see what it says about the locations. The first part of the passage says: "Suppose that we lined up our roughly 14 million United States businesses in order of size, starting with the smallest, along an imaginary road from San Francisco to New York." So the road is from San Francisco to New York. That would mean San Francisco is on the west (since the US is oriented with west on the left if you're facing east). So San Francisco is the starting point, and New York is the eastern end. Then it says, "From San Francisco to about Reno, it is almost unnoticeable..." So Reno is between San Francisco and New York. Then, "From Reno eastward the poles increase in height until, near Columbus, Ohio - about four-fifths of the way across the nation..." So Columbus is further east than Reno. Then as we approach New York, the poles get even taller. So the order is San Francisco, then Reno, then Columbus, then New York. The question is asking for the order from east to west. If San Francisco is on the west and New York is on the east, then the order from east to west would be the reverse. So New York would be the easternmost, then Columbus, then Reno, then San Francisco. Let me check the answer choices. Looking at the options: (A) San Francisco, Reno, New York, Columbus. That would be west to east, then New York and Columbus are mixed up. New York is east of Columbus, so this order is incorrect. (B) San Francisco, Reno, Columbus, New York. That's west to east. The question asks for east to west, so the reverse would be New York, Columbus, Reno, San Francisco. Which is option C. (C) New York, Columbus, Reno, San Francisco. That's east to west. So this is the correct order. (D) New York, Reno, Columbus, San Francisco. That's New York, then Reno, then Columbus. But Columbus is east of Reno, so this would have Columbus after Reno, which would make it more west than Columbus is. So D is incorrect. So the correct answer is C. Let me check again to be sure.
